title: CAIIB Admit Card 2026 Out

detail.title: CAIIB Admit Card 2026 Out
detail.short_info: CAIIB Admit Card 2026 released for the IIBF CAIIB June 2026 exams starting from 31 May 2026. Download your CAIIB hall ticket from iibf.esdsconnect.com using membership/registration number and password and check exam date, shift timing, venue and important exam instructions here.

content.text: The Indian Institute of Banking and Finance (IIBF) has released the CAIIB Admit Card 2026 for the June 2026 exam cycle on its official admit card portal. The call letter is now available online for all eligible members who have successfully registered for the CAIIB June 2026 examinations.

As per the official schedule, the CAIIB June 2026 exams will be held on 31 May, 7 June, 13 June, 14 June and 21 June 2026, with separate dates for each paper. The CAIIB Admit Card 2026 can be downloaded from the IIBF admit letter login at iibf.esdsconnect.com/admitcard/caiib or via the IIBF website (iibf.org.in → Examination/Courses → Admit Letter).
Direct Link to Download CAIIB Admit Card 2026 Here

links.text: Direct Link to Download CAIIB Admit Card 2026 Here

headers: Certified Associate of the Indian Institute of Bankers (CAIIB) 2026
rows: Indian Institute of Banking and Finance (IIBF)
31 May, 7 June, 13 June, 14 June and 21 June 2026 (paper-wise)
4 compulsory papers + 1 elective (100 marks each, 2 hours duration)
CAIIB Admit Card 2026 out in online mode for June exams
Membership Number / Registration Number and Edit Profile Password, plus captcha code

sections.heading: How to Download CAIIB Admit Card 2026

items: Visit the IIBF admit card portal https://iibf.esdsconnect.com/admitcard/caiib or go to iibf.org.in → Examination/Courses → Admit Letter and choose CAIIB.
On the CAIIB admit letter login page, enter your Membership/Registration number as the login ID.
Type the captcha code exactly as shown in the image.
Enter your edit profile password and click on Submit/Login. If you have forgotten the password, use the ‘Forgot password/Get password’ option to receive a new password on your registered email.
Once logged in, click on the CAIIB June 2026 Admit Card/Call Letter link.
Your CAIIB Admit Card 2026 will appear on the screen with exam date, time, venue and other details; download and print 2–3 clear A4‑size copies.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on CAIIB Admit Card 2026

content.text: The CAIIB Admit Card 2026 contains key information that each candidate must verify before the exam:

items: Candidate’s name and membership/registration number
Exam name and session: CAIIB June 2026
Paper name (e.g., Advanced Bank Management, Bank Financial Management, etc.) and exam date
Exam time and reporting time for each paper
Exam venue name, address and centre code
Space for candidate’s signature and invigilator’s signature
General instructions and important exam guidelines

content.text: If any discrepancy is noticed in your name, membership number or exam centre details, you should contact IIBF immediately through the official helpdesk before your exam date.

sections.heading: Documents Required with CAIIB Admit Card 2026

content.text: On the day of the CAIIB 2026 exam, candidates must carry:

items: A printed copy of the CAIIB Admit Card 2026 (clear A4‑size printout; colour or good‑quality black and white).
One original valid photo ID card in original, such as: IIBF membership identity card, or Aadhaar card / e‑Aadhaar PAN Card Employer’s photo ID Driving Licence Election Voter ID Card Passport, etc.
IIBF membership identity card, or
Aadhaar card / e‑Aadhaar
PAN Card
Employer’s photo ID
Driving Licence
Election Voter ID Card
Passport, etc.
A valid calculator if permitted (battery‑operated portable calculator up to 8 functions and 12 digits, as per IIBF norms). Scientific calculators are not allowed.

content.text: Candidates who do not carry the CAIIB call letter 2026 and original photo ID will not be permitted to take the examination.
To ensure smooth conduct of the CAIIB June 2026 exams, follow these exam‑day guidelines:

items: Reach the exam centre well before the reporting time printed on the CAIIB admit card to complete entry, verification and system login; late entry may not be allowed.
Carry only permitted items: CAIIB admit card, original photo ID and allowed calculator (simple, non‑programmable) as per IIBF guidelines.

Do not carry mobile phones, smart watches, electronic gadgets (other than permitted calculator), notes, books or loose papers inside the exam hall; such items are strictly prohibited and may be treated as unfair means.

Follow all instructions displayed on the computer screen and those announced by the invigilators; any attempt at cheating or violating rules can lead to cancellation of the exam and further disciplinary action by IIBF.
Keep your CAIIB admit card safely even after the exam as proof of having appeared, and for any future clarification regarding results or attempts.
